# Test sync offline using fake CLIs and verify event stream contracts
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json

# Verify fake-lark-cli is injected and in PATH
exec lark-cli status
stdout '"status":"ok"'
stdout '"provider":"feishu"'

# Verify fake-ntn is injected and in PATH
exec ntn status
stdout '"status":"ok"'
stdout '"provider":"notion"'

# Login and verify sync --events outputs start and end contracts
exec pinax cloud login --endpoint http://localhost --workspace ws_123 --device dev_laptop --secret-ref op://pinax/cloud-token --vault vault --json

exec pinax sync push --target cloud --events --dry-run --vault vault
stdout '"type":"start"'
stdout '"type":"end"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"command":"sync.push"'
